_meta.purpose: Scholarship routes a Saudi graduate can use to fund a master's. Seeds the Study tab funding guidance and the database. Includes programs that are NOT open to Saudis, flagged so we never recommend them.
_meta.method: Compiled via web research; official links verified. for_saudis is the key filter.

scholarships.covers: Full government scholarship (tuition, stipend, allowances, insurance, airfare) for admits to the world's top-ranked universities
scholarships.note: This is the program our top30 flag maps to. Master's entry typically needs undergrad GPA >= 2.75/4 plus an unconditional offer. Apply via the Safeer (سفير) portal.

scholarships.name_en: Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques Scholarship Program
scholarships.covers: Full funding to study abroad (tuition, stipend, allowances, insurance, travel), serviced abroad by the Saudi Cultural Missions
scholarships.note: The umbrella ابتعاث program; tracks include Al-Ruwwad (Pioneers) and Emdad. Saudi nationals only, via the Safeer portal.

scholarships.covers: Administers and supervises Saudi scholarship students abroad (academic supervision, tuition handling, advising); not a separate award
scholarships.region: USA, UK, Australia, Canada, and others
scholarships.note: The intermediary that services the Custodian scholarship in each country.

scholarships.provider: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology
scholarships.covers: Full tuition, living stipend (up to ~$30,000/yr), housing, medical, relocation; automatic for every admitted student
scholarships.note: All nationalities incl. Saudis; STEM only; no separate scholarship application.

scholarships.covers: Monthly stipend (~EUR 992 master's), insurance, travel; German public-university tuition is generally free
scholarships.note: Open to Saudis but program- and country-specific; check the DAAD database.

scholarships.covers: Full scholarship (tuition, monthly living allowance, travel/installation) for top applicants
scholarships.note: Open to all nationalities incl. Saudis; apply to the specific consortium. Competitive.

scholarships.covers: Full tuition, airfare, living and establishment allowances, health cover
scholarships.note: Saudi Arabia is on the Middle East list, but offerings vary by year and priority field; confirm current Saudi availability.

scholarships.covers: Full tuition, stipend, travel for a one-year UK master's
scholarships.note: NOT available to Saudi nationals: Chevening excludes the six GCC states. Listed so we do not recommend it.

scholarships.covers: Tuition, stipend, airfare, health for US graduate study
scholarships.note: PAUSED for Saudi Arabia: AMIDEAST states the program is currently inactive. Do not recommend.

scholarships.covers: Full tuition, stipend, airfare for UK master's/PhD
scholarships.note: NOT available to Saudis: restricted to Commonwealth-member citizens. Do not recommend.
